labels.label_text_original: 反馈 Feedback 引脚定义表

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是标注为'反馈 Feedback'的引脚定义表，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，包含VCC +5V、GND、VB+、VB-、NC及红、黑、棕、白等线色，对应反馈接口针脚与信号功能及线色关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪位于完整图右上方紫色框的反馈接口区域，表格列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，包含针脚10至17的信号定义和线色，如13为'SHIELDING'，16为'SD+'且颜色为'蓝 BLUE'，17为'SD-'且颜色为'黄 YELLOW'，属于17针编码器反馈连接器的针脚分配表。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图中对应黄色标注的'动力 Power'区域，内容为6针动力连接器表格，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并给出2-U-黄、3-V-红、4-W-黑、6-PE-黄绿等针脚与相线或保护地及线色的对应关系，符合动力接口针脚定义。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框显示带1至6编号孔位的'6 PIN'连接器针位图和型号'HF02106ZJ'，在完整图中位于黄色'动力 Power'区域，旁边同组表格给出U、V、W、PE等动力线定义，因此属于动力连接器引脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected from OCR '3O'; the 'O' is the adjacent circular pin feature, not text.
Corrected from OCR '20'; the '0/O' is the adjacent circular pin feature, not text.
Corrected from OCR '60'; the '0/O' is the adjacent circular pin feature, not text.
Corrected from OCR '∅5'; the diameter-like symbol is the adjacent circular pin feature, not part of the label.
Corrected from OCR '10'; the '0/O' is the adjacent circular pin feature, not text.

terminology_notes: Circular pin-hole graphics were not treated as text.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器针脚标号为 1 至 6
dimension_records.reason: The visible crop shows a circular connector face with six numeric pin labels. OCR results that included adjacent circular pin geometry were corrected to the actual visible numbers.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器针脚标号为 1 至 6

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Circular connector face view with pins numbered 1 through 6.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No dimensional values are visible in this cropped connector-face region.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框显示带1至17编号的圆形'17 PIN'连接器针位图及型号'HF01817ZJ'，在完整图中位于反馈'Feedback'连接器区域，对应编码器/反馈接口的针脚布局。

terminology_notes: 圆形连接器内部数字按针位编号处理，不按机械尺寸处理。

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 连接器可识别针位编号
dimension_records.reason: 这些高置信度 OCR 框位于圆形连接器针孔内，语义为针位编号，不属于尺寸数值。

audit_table_records.parameter_zh: 连接器可识别针位编号

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Not specified in the OCR-supported crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in the OCR-supported crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Not specified in the OCR-supported crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector face shows OCR-supported pin labels 5, 6, 9, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, and 16. Full pin count and connector model are not reliably present in OCR source boxes for this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Several visually apparent pin numbers are not supported by reliable OCR source boxes and are not emitted as text annotations.

unresolved_items.issue: Visible connector pin numbers without reliable OCR source boxes
unresolved_items.details: Pin labels such as 1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 8, 10, and 17 appear visually in the target image, but no reliable corresponding OCR source_id is available, so they are not added as text_annotations.
Large or low-confidence OCR outputs R, C, 0, oOO, J, N, D, and 一 appear to be connector outlines, circles, holes, or structural line artifacts rather than useful engineering text.

regions.group_name: 电机外形及轴端键槽尺寸

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示电机侧视外形、轴端、法兰和键槽局部尺寸，包含'KEY'、'40'、'6'、'55±1'、'143.5±1.5'、'φ110'、'CM6L18'等尺寸和公差标注，属于机械结构外形与安装尺寸信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR '24.5.0.2' to engineering limit tolerance format with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.2.
Corrected OCR '∅22-0.013,' to diameter callout with visible upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.013; removed trailing comma.
Corrected OCR '∅110-0.035' to diameter callout with visible upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.035.

terminology_notes: Φ is used as the normalized diameter symbol for OCR variants such as ∅.
Limit tolerances are normalized as nominal upper/lower deviation.
translation_notes: KEY is retained as the visible English label and interpreted as a shaft key/keyway feature where applicable.
ref is interpreted as reference dimension.

dimension_records.reason: The 40 dimension is shown on the separate key detail view labeled KEY, indicating key length.
The horizontal key detail includes a transverse 6 dimension and is labeled KEY.
The small end view of the separate key detail shows a 6 dimension, corresponding to the key thickness/height.
This is a leader callout number on the motor body, not a dimensional value.
This is a leader callout number on the motor body, not a dimensional value.
The KEY text with leader points to the key feature on the shaft.

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 键槽高度/径向位置尺寸
dimension_records.parameter_en: Keyseat height or radial position dimension
dimension_records.reason: The vertical dimension is adjacent to the shaft key feature and gives a limit tolerance value.
The 5 dimension is located at the shaft key region; the exact named parameter is not explicitly stated, but it is a visible direct key-related dimension.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Shaft diameter Φ22 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.013
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 轴径 Φ22 mm，上偏差 0，下偏差 -0.013
dimension_records.reason: The diameter symbol and vertical dimension arrows identify the main shaft diameter with limit tolerance.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Locating diameter Φ110 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.035
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 定位外径 Φ110 mm，上偏差 0，下偏差 -0.035
dimension_records.reason: The large vertical diameter callout spans the front locating/mounting diameter and includes limit tolerance.
The leader points to the shaft end and the callout is a thread or shaft-end specification rather than a linear dimension.
The callout explicitly includes '(ref)', indicating a reference dimension.
The callout explicitly includes '(ref)', indicating a reference dimension near the motor front flange/body transition.
The bottom horizontal dimension spans the main motor body length and carries a bilateral tolerance.
The bottom horizontal dimension spans the shaft extension region from shaft end to front mounting reference, with bilateral tolerance.

frontend_table_records.parameter: Keyseat height or radial position dimension

frontend_table_records.specification: Shaft diameter Φ22 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.013
Locating diameter Φ110 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.035

audit_table_records.parameter_zh: 键槽高度/径向位置尺寸
audit_table_records.parameter_en: Keyseat height or radial position dimension

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 轴径 Φ22 mm，上偏差 0，下偏差 -0.013
定位外径 Φ110 mm，上偏差 0，下偏差 -0.035

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting/locating diameter is Φ110 with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.035. A 13.5 mm reference offset is also shown near the front body/flange region.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft diameter is Φ22 with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.013. Shaft extension length is 55±1. Shaft end callout CM6L18 is present. Key detail shows 40 mm length and 6 mm by 6 mm section, with shaft key-related dimensions 24.5 0/-0.2 and 5.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main motor body length shown in this crop is 143.5±1.5. Additional reference dimensions include 5.5(ref) and 13.5(ref).
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector geometry is visible, but no connector text callouts are present in the OCR source boxes for this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional visible text without OCR source was added. Low-confidence OCR artifacts from drawing lines were discarded.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机前端结构视图，包含安装法兰、圆形端面、安装孔和尺寸标注，如'Ø145±0.2'、'4-Ø9'、'45°'、'130'；顶部仅标出'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'和'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'的物理位置，没有针脚功能、线色或接线表，因此归为机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 前视连接器与安装尺寸
title.title_en: Front View Connectors and Mounting Dimensions

text_annotations.correction_note: Inserted diameter symbol Ø based on the visible engineering callout.
Corrected the hole callout by restoring the omitted diameter symbol Ø.
Merged split OCR fragments; the isolated 'O' is treated as the degree symbol.
Merged duplicate OCR reads of the same bottom size callout and restored the square symbol.

terminology_notes: Restored common engineering symbols such as Ø, □, and ° when clearly implied by the drawing.
translation_notes: Connector labels are preserved as engineering interface annotations rather than converted into numeric dimensions.

dimension_records.reason: Top-left label identifies the motor connector interface.
Top-right label identifies the encoder connector interface.
Diameter callout points to the main circular envelope of the front view.
This is the mounting hole pattern callout near the lower-right of the view.
Two symmetric angle callouts on the lower arc share the same value.
Bottom overall square dimension defines the external footprint width.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Lower-right callout indicates 4 mounting holes of Ø9, with symmetric 45° angle annotations around the lower arc.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft or keyway-specific callout is visible in this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main front envelope includes Ø145±0.2 and a □130 overall square size.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Two top connectors are labeled: 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No unresolved OCR items are retained for this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机外形图右侧的技术参数表，列出极数、母线电压、额定功率、额定转矩、额定转速、转动惯量、最大径向力、最大轴向力、绝缘等级、防护等级和重量等整机规格；未包含连接器针脚对应关系，也不是扭矩-转速曲线，因此在现有类别中最接近机械尺寸/整机规格信息。

连续静态转矩 Standstill torque Ts (N.m)
连续静态电流 Standstill Current Is (A)
电气时间常数 Electrical time constant Te (ms)
机械时间常数 Mechanical time constant Tm (ms)
反电势常数 Voltage constant Ke (V/krpm)
转矩常数 Torque constant Kt (Nm/A)

最大轴向力 Max. axial force Fa(N)

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机性能曲线图，横轴为转速 n(rpm)，纵轴为扭矩 T(N.m)，包含 'Intermittent' 与 'Continuous' 工作区曲线，并标注 14.33、4.78、3.19 等扭矩值，符合扭矩-转速关系图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged vertical axis label fragments and corrected spacing/punctuation from OCR readings.
Corrected OCR text Centinous to visible word Continuous.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Chart explicitly shows N.m and rpm; no mechanical dimension unit assumption applied

terminology_notes: The image region is a torque-speed performance curve rather than a mechanical dimension drawing.
OCR fragments and grid-line noise were removed where they duplicated or did not form meaningful labels.
translation_notes: Intermittent translated as 间歇工作.
Continuous translated as 连续工作.

dimension_records.reason: Visible vertical axis label identifies the plotted torque quantity, reconstructed from OCR fragments.
Visible bottom axis label identifies rotational speed and unit.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域位于完整图纸标题栏内，内容为'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m Unit:mm'和线性尺寸分段公差，表达机械图未注尺寸公差要求，属于机械尺寸公差信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
